tasks.subject: Task 1: Backend — delta helper + extend api_server_status + add api_live_pcu
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Two endpoints expose PCU delta data — api_server_status gains delta_15m, api_live_pcu returns an HTML partial.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/routes/dashboard.py` (imports line 15, lines 731–750 area)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] GET /api/server-status returns delta_15m: int | null
- [ ] GET /api/live-pcu returns HTML fragment with id="live-pcu-tile"
- [ ] Both handle missing ESI rows gracefully (return null/empty)

**Verify:** `curl https://vigilant.thunderborn.dev/api/server-status` — JSON includes delta_15m key.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/routes/dashboard.py"], "verifyCommand": "python3 -c \"import ast; ast.parse(open('app/routes/dashboard.py').read())\" && echo OK", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GET /api/server-status returns delta_15m key", "GET /api/live-pcu returns HTML with id=live-pcu-tile", "Graceful when no ESI snapshots exist"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Template — create live_pcu_tile.html partial
tasks.description:
**Goal:** htmx swap target partial that renders the live PCU tile and re-arms its own 60s poll on every swap.

**Files:**
- Create: `app/templates/partials/live_pcu_tile.html`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Wraps in id="live-pcu-tile" div with hx-get/hx-trigger/hx-swap
- [ ] Shows formatted count or — (muted) when count_str is None
- [ ] Delta badge colored correctly

**Verify:** ls app/templates/partials/live_pcu_tile.html

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/templates/partials/live_pcu_tile.html"], "verifyCommand": "ls app/templates/partials/live_pcu_tile.html", "acceptanceCriteria": ["id=live-pcu-tile wrapper with htmx attrs", "Handles null count_str gracefully", "Delta badge colored correctly"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Dashboard JS — render delta badge on pilots count
tasks.description:
**Goal:** updateServerStatus() reads data.delta_15m and appends a colored +N/-N badge next to pilot count.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/templates/dashboard.html` (lines ~499–527)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Green +N badge when delta_15m > 0
- [ ] Red -N badge when delta_15m < 0
- [ ] No badge when delta is 0, null, or server offline

**Verify:** grep -n 'delta_15m' app/templates/dashboard.html

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/templates/dashboard.html"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n 'delta_15m' app/templates/dashboard.html | head -5", "acceptanceCriteria": ["delta_15m read from API", "+N green badge", "-N red badge", "No badge on 0/null"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Activity page — add live tile placeholder + widen stat grid
tasks.description:
**Goal:** /tools/activity gains a 5th Live pilots tile that htmx loads on page load and refreshes every 60s.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/templates/tools_activity.html` (lines ~68–85)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Stat grid is 5-column
- [ ] Live tile fires hx-get on load + every 60s
- [ ] Visible across all time windows

**Verify:** grep -n 'repeat(5' app/templates/tools_activity.html

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/templates/tools_activity.html"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n 'repeat(5' app/templates/tools_activity.html", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Grid is 5-column", "hx-trigger load + every 60s", "Visible across all time windows"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Deploy and smoke-test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** All changes live on VPS, verified working.

**Files:** None.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] No startup errors in docker logs
- [ ] Dashboard shows pilot count with colored delta badge
- [ ] /tools/activity shows 5 stat tiles with live count
- [ ] Live tile refreshes ~every 60s

**Verify:** ssh ijohnson@146.190.140.112 'docker logs vigilant-app-1 --tail 20'

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "ssh ijohnson@146.190.140.112 'docker logs vigilant-app-1 --tail 20'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No startup errors", "delta_15m in server-status JSON", "Live tile on activity page", "Dashboard delta badge visible"]}
```
